zh.St John's Church, Exeter, Devon, England: 英國戴文艾可謝特聖 越恩斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud d'Aubeney於1371年11月29日出生在英國林可爾史爾素斯 英格萊比時，她的父親Giles Daubeney37歲，母親Lady Alainore de Willington34歲。她於1390年4月之前與Sir John Hill在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1416年4月21日在英國戴文艾可謝特享年44歲，埋葬在英國戴文艾可謝特聖 越恩斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud d'Aubeney于1371年11月29日出生在英国林可爾史爾素斯 英格萊比时，她的父亲Giles Daubeney37岁，母亲Lady Alainore de Willington34岁。她于1390年4月之前与Sir John Hill在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1416年4月21日在英国戴文艾可謝特享年44岁，埋葬在英国戴文艾可謝特聖 越恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: d'Aubeney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Daubney
meanings: English (mainly Lincolnshire; of Norman origin): habitational name for someone from any of several places in northern France called Aubigny, named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Albinius (a derivative of Latin albus ‘white’; compare Albin ) + the habitational suffix -acum. Compare Dabney .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud d'Aubeney was born on 29 November 1371, in South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Giles Daubeney, was 37 and her mother, Lady Alainore de Willington, was 34. She married Sir John Hill before April 1390, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 21 April 1416, in Exeter, Devon, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in St John's Church, Exeter, Devon, England.

fr.St John's Church, Exeter, Devon, England: St John's Church, Exeter, Devon, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud d'Aubeney est née le 29 novembre 1371, à South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Giles Daubeney, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lady Alainore de Willington, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Hill avant avril 1390, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 avril 1416, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à St John's Church, Exeter, Devon, Angleterre.

de.St John's Church, Exeter, Devon, England: St John's Church, Exeter, Devon, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Maud d'Aubeney am 29. November 1371 in South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Giles Daubeney 37 und ihre Mutter Lady Alainore de Willington 34. Sie hat vor April 1390 in England Sir John Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. April 1416 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Exeter, Devon, England und wurde in St John's Church, Exeter, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud d'Aubeney è nata il il 29 novembre 1371 nel South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Giles Daubeney, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Lady Alainore de Willington, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Hill prima del aprile 1390, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 21 aprile 1416, nel Exeter, Devon, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a St John's Church, Exeter, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud d'Aubeneyが1371年11月29日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアソウス イングレビーで生まれた時，父Giles Daubeneyは37歳，母Lady Alainore de Willingtonは34歳であった。1390年4月以前にイギリスでSir John Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1416年4月21日にイギリスデボンエクセターで44歳で死去し，イギリスデボンエクセタースト ジョン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St John's Church, Exeter, Devon, England: 영국 데폰 세터 스트 존'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Maud d'Aubeney(이)가 1371년 11월 29일 영국 링코실르 소우스 잉글레비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Giles Daubeney(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alainore de Willington(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1390년 4월 이전 영국에서 Sir John Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1416년 4월 21일 영국 데폰 세터에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 세터 스트 존'스 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.St John's Church, Exeter, Devon, England: St John's Church, Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud d'Aubeney nasceu em 29 de novembro de 1371, em South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Giles Daubeney, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alainore de Willington, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Hill antes abril de 1390, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de abril de 1416, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em St John's Church, Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.St John's Church, Exeter, Devon, England: ст джон'с чурч, эксетир, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud d'Aubeney родилась 29 ноября 1371 г. в местности соут инглеби, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Giles Daubeney было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alainore de Willington, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Hill перед апрель 1390 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 21 апреля 1416 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности ст джон'с чурч, эксетир, девон, Англия.
